name: Authorization Bypass Through User-Controlled SQL Primary Key
description: The application uses user-controlled input as a SQL primary key value in database queries, allowing attackers to modify the key to access unauthorized records and bypass row-level access controls.
detection_pattern: INGRESS node carrying user-controlled data flows into TRANSFORM (SQL query construction) where the value is used as a primary key for EXTERNAL (database) access without an AUTH node enforcing row-level authorization checks.
